title: Mask /sys/devices/virtual/powercap by default
body:
This mimics #5111 but without the vendor update, which is very large on this branch.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *nalind* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.32/OWNERS)~~ [nalind] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I'ze confused, I don't see this change in #5111  But I could be too distracted by the meeting I'm in.
5111 vendored c/common and changed to using a c/common list of masked paths, which included this.

It switched from masking a list of paths maintained in this repository to a list that was recently added to the common repo.  By doing so, it replaced /sys/dev with /sys/dev/block in that set of paths, and we're not doing that here, but as this PR is already only aiming to pull in part of that set of changes, I guess it's fine.
/lgtm
/hold

Thanks for the explanation, now I see it.
LGTM

@nalind: new pull request created: #5116

<details>
